final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: fashion-editorial
Asset type: haute couture lookbook, runway campaign
Primary request: conceptual evening gown inspired by deep-sea bioluminescent creatures
Scene/backdrop: pure black studio void, professional stage lighting from multiple angles
Subject: floor-length couture gown with multi-layer semi-transparent organza skirt printed with jellyfish tentacle patterns, bodice with 3D coral embroidery and Swarovski crystals in blue/green/purple
Style/medium: fashion illustration meets photography composite, haute couture editorial
Composition/framing: full-length fashion portrait, centered figure, dramatic vertical emphasis
Lighting/mood: theatrical multi-source studio lighting highlighting translucent fabric and bioluminescent effects, mysterious and luxurious
Color palette: deep ocean blue, fluorescent violet/purple, coral orange, iridescent crystal reflections
Materials/textures: layered organza with jellyfish print, 3D embroidered coral texture, Swarovski crystal embellishments, flowing translucent fabric
Constraints: maintain bioluminescent glow effect, preserve couture craftsmanship details, keep black background for contrast
Avoid: flat lighting, synthetic cheap fabric appearance, cluttered background, cartoonish colors, amateur photography
